title: Twilio doesn’t work with mirror column?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like using Twilio Integration to send a message to my customers when a statut changed. I using a mirror column for phone number ( from contact board). I don’t know why but when I using mirror’s board inte…

posts.author: Jonove (Jonathan De wilde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I would like using Twilio Integration to send a message to my customers when a statut changed. I using a mirror column for phone number ( from contact board). I don’t know why but when I using mirror’s board integration it’s doesn’t work ( error message )…? If I create directly a phone column it’s work ! Any suggestion ?

Thank you.

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you check automation activity and share screenshot what exactly the error is.

posts.author: Jonove (Jonathan De wilde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Rehan,

I added screenshots of error, when the statut changing automation understand it’s time to activate the action, but message error appear and said : ‘’ Automation was desactivated because column was deleted " but column is still there and when i want modify the automation the column selection has disappeared and cant change it.

Capture1194×576 12.7 KB

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: I checked it, mirror column doesn’t work with twilio integration. I jumped on call with him and suggested make.com . Also helped him to built integration with monday.

posts.author: Jonove (Jonathan De wilde)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, Thank you very much for your help ! Make.com working perfectly, it’s easy to use and you explained me very well . 1000 thank a lot
